parents.subject: LU-18221 tests: check UBSAN and KASAN in check_dmesg_for_errors()

commit.subject: LUS-12561 zfs-osd: za_name flexible array
commit.message:
LUS-12561 zfs-osd: za_name flexible array

zfs-2.3 commit 3cf2bfa57008af7f0690f73491d7f9b4ac4ed65a
  Allocate zap_attribute_t from kmem instead of stack

za_name maximum size increased to ZAP_MAXNAMELEN_NEW

ozi_name should be large enough to hold the largest za_name

HPE-bug-id: LUS-12561
Test-Parameters: for-build-only fstype=zfs
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I2f9f5796bc50cc5f04fdb7e5b366a977a4f8e34c
